summary: The diff correctly updates ProductCard.tsx to use https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk as the href for the pre-order button, opens it in a new tab with rel='noopener noreferrer', and preserves the button label 'Pre-Order Now → DM on Instagram'. All acceptance criteria for REQ-31 appear to be met. No files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui were modified. No hallucinated features were detected.
